name: Smart Home & Household Management Assistant
description: AI assistant managing a household over a year. Tracks appliance issues, service contacts, utility info, recurring tasks, and home maintenance state changes.

turns.content: I moved into 338 Birchwood Court. Three bed, two bath. Built in 1994.
Home profile: 338 Birchwood Court, 3BR/2BA, built 1994.
HVAC company is Comfort Air Solutions, my tech is Dave Pelletier. Last service was about 18 months ago.
HVAC: Comfort Air Solutions, tech Dave Pelletier. Last service 18 months ago — overdue.
Water heater is a Rheem 40-gallon, installed 2011. Model RH40T.
Water heater: Rheem 40-gal, model RH40T, installed 2011 (13 years old — approaching end of life).
Trash pickup is Tuesday mornings. Recycling is every other Tuesday.
Trash: every Tuesday AM. Recycling: biweekly Tuesday AM.
Had Dave come out for the HVAC service. Filters were filthy — he replaced them. Recommends annual servicing every September.
HVAC serviced. Filters replaced. Recurring: annual service every September with Dave Pelletier.
The dishwasher isn't draining properly. Pool of water after cycles. It's a Bosch 500 series, bought in 2019.
Dishwasher issue: Bosch 500 series (2019), not draining. Likely drain hose or filter clog.
I called an appliance repair service — Tom's Appliance Repair, 630-555-0124. Tech found the drain filter clogged. Cleared it. No parts needed.
Dishwasher resolved: drain filter clog cleared by Tom's Appliance Repair (630-555-0124). No parts needed.
The water heater started making rumbling sounds. Plumber says sediment buildup — at this age (13 yrs) should just replace it.
Water heater: sediment rumbling, 13 years old. Plumber recommends replacement.
We're replacing it with a Bradford White 50-gallon heat pump water heater. Better efficiency. Installing Friday.
Water heater replacement scheduled Friday: Bradford White 50-gal heat pump model. Old Rheem RH40T retiring.
Done — new one is in. Plumber was Tim Calloway from Calloway Plumbing, 630-555-0299.
Water heater installed: Bradford White 50-gal heat pump. Plumber: Tim Calloway, Calloway Plumbing, 630-555-0299. Old Rheem RH40T retired.
We had a big storm. There's a shingle missing on the back slope. Got a quote from Premier Roofing — $450 for the repair.
Roof damage: missing shingle (back slope), storm damage. Premier Roofing quote: $450.
Also the gutters are overflowing on the north side — probably need to clean them. Haven't done it in two years.
Gutters: north side overflow, last cleaned 2+ years ago. Overdue.
Premier Roofing did the repair. Also found and fixed a small flashing issue near the chimney at no extra charge.
Roof repaired: shingle replaced + chimney flashing fixed at no extra cost. Premier Roofing.
Had the gutters cleaned. Both north and south side. Also installed gutter guards — should be good for 5 years now.
Gutters: cleaned (both sides) + guards installed. Next cleaning estimated in 5 years.
The dishwasher drain issue came back. Tom's came out again — this time a different problem, the drain pump failed. Replaced it for $180.
Dishwasher: drain pump failed and replaced ($180). Second service call. Monitor for further issues — may indicate end-of-life for this unit.
Refrigerator started running louder too. Brand is LG, model LRMVS3006S, bought 2020. Haven't called anyone yet.
Refrigerator: LG LRMVS3006S (2020), running loud. No service call yet — monitor.

queries.query: What water heater do we currently have?
queries.expected_answer: Bradford White 50-gallon heat pump water heater, installed recently. The original Rheem 40-gallon (RH40T, 2011) was replaced.
queries.trap: Session 1 establishes Rheem as current. Session 3 replaces it. Must return the new unit.

queries.query: Who is the plumber contact?
Is the dishwasher draining correctly now?
queries.expected_answer: Unclear — it has had two service calls. The drain filter was cleared first (session 2), then the drain pump failed and was replaced for $180 (session 5). May be approaching end of life.
queries.trap: Session 2 shows issue resolved. Session 5 introduces a new failure. System must not say 'resolved' — there's been a second incident.

queries.query: When is the HVAC service due?
queries.expected_answer: Every September — annual service with Dave Pelletier from Comfort Air Solutions.

queries.query: What appliances or systems are currently showing issues?
queries.expected_answer: LG refrigerator (LRMVS3006S, 2020) is running loud — no service call yet. All other recent issues (water heater, dishwasher pump, roof, gutters) have been addressed.
queries.trap: Must identify only the currently unresolved issue (refrigerator) and not list resolved issues as active.

queries.query: What is the trash and recycling schedule?
queries.expected_answer: Trash: every Tuesday morning. Recycling: every other Tuesday morning.

queries.query: Who fixed the dishwasher the first time and what was wrong?
queries.expected_answer: Tom's Appliance Repair (630-555-0124). Drain filter was clogged — cleared at no parts cost.
queries.trap: There were two dishwasher service calls. Must correctly identify the first one specifically.

queries.query: What additional repair did Premier Roofing do beyond the shingle?
queries.expected_answer: Fixed a small chimney flashing issue at no extra charge.

queries.query: Do the gutters need cleaning soon?
queries.expected_answer: No. Recently cleaned (both sides) and gutter guards installed. Estimated maintenance-free for about 5 years.
queries.trap: Session 4 flags gutters as overdue. Session 5 resolves it with cleaning AND guards. Must reflect resolved + future-proofed state.

queries.query: What was the Rheem water heater model and year?
queries.expected_answer: Rheem RH40T, 40-gallon, installed 2011. Retired after 13 years.
queries.trap: Water heater was replaced. System should accurately recall the old unit's details.

queries.query: What year was the house built?
How much did the dishwasher pump repair cost?
queries.trap: Must retrieve the second dishwasher call's cost, not the first (which had no parts cost).

queries.query: What is the HVAC company and contact tech?
queries.expected_answer: Comfort Air Solutions. Tech: Dave Pelletier.

queries.query: Was there a roof repair? What was done?
queries.expected_answer: Yes — missing shingle on back slope replaced, plus chimney flashing fixed. Done by Premier Roofing after a storm. Cost: $450 (no extra charge for flashing).

queries.query: What appliance repair service number should I call?
Why was the water heater replaced instead of repaired?
queries.expected_answer: Sediment buildup caused rumbling, and the unit was 13 years old. Plumber recommended replacement at that age rather than repair.

queries.query: What is the dishwasher model?
Has the dishwasher had multiple issues?
queries.expected_answer: Yes — two service calls: (1) drain filter clog (cleared, no parts), (2) drain pump failure ($180 repair). The repeat failures suggest the unit may be approaching end of life.
queries.trap: Must recognize this as a recurring pattern across sessions, not a single event.

queries.query: What is the refrigerator model and what is the current issue?
queries.expected_answer: LG LRMVS3006S, purchased 2020. Running louder than normal. No service call placed yet.

queries.query: Give me a full maintenance summary — what's been done, what's pending.
queries.expected_answer: Done: HVAC service (annual Sept), dishwasher drain filter (cleared), water heater replaced (Bradford White heat pump), dishwasher drain pump replaced, roof repaired (shingle + flashing), gutters cleaned + guards installed. Pending: LG refrigerator loud noise (no service call yet). Recurring: HVAC every September.
queries.trap: Requires accurate status for every item — distinguishing resolved, pending, and recurring. Must not list the old Rheem as current or the first dishwasher fix as the last one.
